items.title: Briton among 19 killed in Nepal bus crash
items.description: Nepalese police say the British national was a 24-year-old man.

items.title: Watch: Winter storm covers parts north-east US in snow
items.description: Weather warnings and travel bans are in place, as the storm causes power outages.

items.title: Armed man killed after entering secure perimeter of Trump's residence, Secret Service says
items.description: The suspect was carrying a shotgun and fuel can when he was killed, officers say, while Trump was in Washington DC at the time.

items.title: Kim Jong Un re-appointed leader of North Korea's ruling party
items.description: The announcement by the rubber-stamp party congress comes as little surprise given the Kim family's grip since the 1940s.

items.title: What the killing of drug lord 'El Mencho' means for Mexico
items.description: Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as "El Mencho", was killed during a security operation to arrest him, Mexico's defence ministry has said.
